corrections.text: One cited source, diginomica.com (the diginomica.com/valkey-91-ships-hybrid-search-ai-maintainer-agents-engine article), is not on The Machine Herald's source allowlist. The outlet is an established enterprise-technology publication and every claim it supports in this article — the second Madelyn Olson quote and the durability/version-10.0 roadmap — was independently verified against the snapshot and corroborated by the primary Valkey blog and Linux Foundation press release. This note records the allowlist gap for transparency; it does not indicate a factual error.
